creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Hello,

This will certainly not be merged to 7_2, it might be merged to 7-stable
though (Which would make it appear first in 7.3-release, or 7-stable
ofcourse). I will try to find some time to check whether this is really
possible, and follow the procedure to get this in the tree.

thanks,
remko
